arts.ttl: Sources: Man City, Barca & Real on alert as Newcastle United star indicates he wants transfer away
arts.sum: Top clubs such as Manchester City, Barcelona, Real Madrid, Juventus, Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain are on alert for Sandro Tonali. Sources close to the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Tonali has indicated that he could be open to leaving Newcastle United this summer. The Italy international has performed well since moving to St James’ […] The post Sources: Man City, Barca & Real on alert as Newcastle United star indicates he wants transfer away appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Meet Eddie Howe's left-hand man Newcastle United star Lewis Hall loves as close friend steps up
arts.sum: But he is a vital part of the set-up at Newcastle United these days, even if former England coach Jones and Tindall get a little bit more of the limelight. Newcastle United head coach Eddie Howe was admitted to hospital last week after leading the Magpies to a 3-0 win over Leicester City before the club announced he was recovering after being diagnosed with pneumonia.

arts.ttl: 'Eddie will do anything to be there' - Newcastle boss unleashes secret weapons
arts.sum: Howe remains a colossal miss - a number of current players had never seen him sit out a training session, let alone a game - but the Newcastle boss has put systems and processes in place in recent years to leave the group in no doubt of what is expected of them. To have a whole team of coaches to split players into units, to take them aside for individual work, to drive home his message, has been crucial since the 47-year-old took charge.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Newcastle Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Aston Villa, currently seventh in the league, host third-placed Newcastle in a highly anticipated Premier League clash at Villa Park on Saturday, April 19th, at 17:30. Both teams are vying for a covet...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes stance clear on Jason Tindall after 20-man brawl at Newcastle
arts.sum: Newcastle, meanwhile, have won their last three Premier League matches against Villa, scoring at least three goals in each. Unai Emery says he has "no problem" with Newcastle assistant manager Jason Tindall, who was at the centre of a bust-up during the last meeting between Aston Villa and the Magpies on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Transfer Talk Update: Thomas Partey, Federico Chiesa, Morgan Rogers

arts.ttl: Newcastle United rival Aston Villa for dream signing of Manchester City star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly one of the clubs keen on a potential summer transfer window swoop for Manchester City star Jack Grealish. The England international has fallen down the pecking order in Pep Guardiola’s side in recent times, and it seems he’s now facing an uncertain future. arts.ttl: Unai Emery takes full ownership of 'angry' Ollie Watkins situation at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Unai Emery has raised eyebrows with how he's used England striker Ollie Watkins of late, again plumping for Marcus Rashford over his top scorer in the Champions League against PSG in midweek

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford future decided as Harry Maguire makes plea
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking towards the summer transfer window and hope to secure some top-quality players, with potential qualification for the Champions League a major incentive
